initial_catalog.name: delivery_speed
initial_catalog.description: Refers to how fast the product was shipped or arrived.

initial_catalog.name: product_satisfaction
initial_catalog.description: General expression of happiness or approval with the product.
examples: My daughter is thoroughly happy with this.

initial_catalog.name: performance_speed
initial_catalog.description: Refers to the processing speed or responsiveness of the device.
examples: The new M1 chip is blazing fast

initial_catalog.name: data_transfer
initial_catalog.description: Ease of moving data from an old device to the new one.
examples: It was easy to move all my data to the new device

initial_catalog.name: device_usage_frequency
initial_catalog.description: How often the product is used or handled.
examples: it's pretty much never not in my hand

initial_catalog.name: ecosystem_compatibility
initial_catalog.description: How well the product integrates with other devices or systems.
examples: Very useful and flexible with my other Mac products.

initial_catalog.name: device_syncing
initial_catalog.description: Ability to synchronize data with other devices.
examples: It syncs to my MacBook Pro and iPhone 6+.

initial_catalog.name: multitasking_capability
initial_catalog.description: Ability to run multiple applications simultaneously.
examples: its best at multitasking i mean come on netflix and study ill take it

initial_catalog.name: internet_connection_speed
examples: the connection to the internet is fast

initial_catalog.name: processing_speed
initial_catalog.description: Speed at which the device handles data.
examples: the M1 chip processes data extremely fast

initial_catalog.name: performance_reliability
initial_catalog.description: Indicates that the product is functioning correctly or meeting expectations.

initial_catalog.name: price_competitiveness
initial_catalog.description: Refers to the cost of the product relative to similar items on the market.

initial_catalog.name: customer_satisfaction
initial_catalog.description: Expresses a positive emotional response or high regard for the product.
examples: I’m so excited couldn’t wait for it to get here
